rules.title: Unprotected public mutation
rules.prompt: Check public or PTB-composable functions that mutate privileged state without capability, owner, witness, phase, or object-state authorization.

rules.title: Ignored authorization result
rules.prompt: Check authorization helpers that return booleans or validation values whose results are ignored or checked after mutation.

rules.title: Missing capability or witness guard
rules.prompt: Check critical mint, burn, config, withdrawal, ownership, and shared-state mutations for capability or witness requirements.

rules.title: Possible zero denominator
rules.prompt: Prove every denominator is nonzero before division, including oracle, pool, supply, and collection length inputs.

rules.title: Unchecked narrowing cast
rules.prompt: Check all narrowing casts for explicit upper-bound proof before the cast.

rules.title: Precision loss or premature flooring
rules.prompt: Check multiplication/division order, decimal scaling, basis-point math, and rounding near zero.

rules.title: Unbounded VecMap or VecSet
rules.prompt: Check unbounded collections for gas griefing, DoS, and missed cleanup.

rules.title: Shared mutable bottleneck
rules.prompt: Check shared mutable objects for unnecessary contention, broad write access, and missing state/version guards.

rules.title: Blind transfer to object
rules.prompt: Check transfers to object IDs for a matching receive path and ability to recover or use the transferred asset.

rules.title: Missing version check
rules.prompt: Check upgradeable shared state mutations for version fields, migration paths, and stale-object rejection.

rules.title: Missing authorization negative test
rules.prompt: Generate negative tests proving unauthorized callers cannot change config, move assets, or mutate privileged state.

rules.title: Missing repeated-call or wrong-order test
rules.prompt: Generate tests for repeated calls, wrong phase, reused receipts, stale state, and before-unlock/expiry behavior.
